title: Sollaayo Vaithirandhu Lyrics Mogamul
stanzas:
nillaayo neeril vandhu
naan azhaikka
neeril vandhu
oonjal manam andraadam
unnodu mandradum velai.

Sollaayo vaaithirandhu
vaarthai ondru
podhum ingu
kannaana kannaa
un pollaadha leelai
Sollaayo vaaithirandhu

thoondilil puzhuvaaga
thirumaeni vaada
thaamatham ini yaeno
iru maeni kooda.

andhi varum, thendral sudum
oor viragam viragam ezhum.

endru varum, inba sugam
oon urugum urugum dhinam

naal muzhuthum
ovvoru pozhudhum
un vannangal ennangal
nenjukkul niraindhidum

naalthorum paarvaiyil
naan vidum thoodhu
kooraadho naan padum
paadugal nooru.

naan oru aandaalo
thiruppaavai paada
yezhaiyai vidalaamo
idhupola vaada

velli nira vennilavil
venguzhalin isaiyum varum.
nalliravil mellisaiyil
thaen alaigal ninaivil ezhum

oorjithaiyam unnaal ilagum
innerathil kannaa
un mounathai thavirthu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Sollaayo Vaithirandhu?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

In which movie does Sollaayo Vaithirandhu appear?

The song is featured in the movie Mogamul.

Who is the singer of Sollaayo Vaithirandhu?

The song is sung by the renowned artist S.Janaki.

Who composed the music for Sollaayo Vaithirandhu?

The music for this song was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

When was Sollaayo Vaithirandhu released?

The song was released on May 14, 1995.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sollaayo Vaithirandhu, the listener is taken on an emotional journey through the poignant lyrics that reflect the pain of separation and the beauty of love. The song's soothing melody, crafted by Ilaiyaraaja, complements the heartfelt vocals of S.Janaki, making it a timeless classic. It evokes feelings of nostalgia and longing, perfectly suited for romantic occasions. This song remains a cherished piece in the realm of Tamil music, resonating with anyone who has experienced love's bittersweet moments.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sollaayo Vaithirandhu is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of longing and love, beautifully rendered by the legendary S.Janaki. The song's soothing lyrics and enchanting composition by Ilaiyaraaja create an unforgettable listening experience. Dive into this classic that resonates with the heart's deepest emotions and showcases the timeless beauty of Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: Just say one word, just say it.
I came to cry in the water, I came to swing with you, this is the work of the heart.
Just say one word, just say it, here, my dear, your playful charm, just say one word, just say it.
Oh, the sun rises in the sky, in the work of the moon, there is a sweet feeling.
In the crowd, like a worm, the bride's beauty is now a mystery, why is there a need for two beauties?
When dusk comes, the breeze blows, the town is filled with longing, longing rises.
When it comes, happiness melts, every day it melts away.
All day long, every moment, your colors fill my heart.
Just say one word, just say it.
The swing of the heart is the work with you.
Just say one word, just say it.
In the gaze of the day, I will not let go of the message, I will sing a hundred songs.
Am I a wanderer, will I sing the song of the return, will I let go of the burden?
In the silver light, in the moonlight, the music of the flute will come. In the sweet sound of the good night, the honey will rise in thought.
With your energy, the world will shine, my dear, break your silence.
Just say one word, just say it.
The swing of the heart is the work with you.
Just say one word, just say it.
